Google_Trans:
Address by His Excellency Vladimir Putin,
President of the Russian Federation

Dear Russian citizens! Dear friends!
Today, I feel it necessary to return to the tragic events unfolding in Donbas and to the key issues related to Russia's security.
I will begin with what I said in my address on February 21 of this year. I am referring to what is of particular concern to us, namely the fundamental threats that irresponsible Western politicians are posing to our country in an excessive and arrogant manner, step by step, year after year. This is NATO's eastward expansion, the fact that its military infrastructure is approaching Russia's borders.
It is well known that for 30 years we have been persistently and patiently trying to reach an agreement with the main NATO countries on the principles of equal and indivisible security in Europe. In response to our proposals, we have consistently received only cynical deception and lies, or attempts at pressure and blackmail, while the Atlantic Alliance, despite all our protests and concerns, continues to expand. The war machine is in motion and, I repeat, it is approaching very close to our borders.
Why is all this happening? Why this arrogant attitude of speaking from the perspective of its own exclusivity, infallibility, and permissiveness? Where does this indifferent and disdainful attitude toward our interests and our absolutely legitimate demands come from?
The answer is clear, everything is clear and obvious. The Soviet Union weakened at the end of the 1980s, then collapsed. Everything that happened then is a good lesson for us today; it highlighted that the paralysis of power and will is the first step toward complete decay and oblivion. As soon as we lost our self-confidence for a certain period, the balance of power in the world was disrupted.

This led to a situation where existing treaties and agreements are no longer truly in force. Persuasion and appeals have no effect. Anything that doesn't suit the hegemon, the world's powerful, is labeled archaic, obsolete, and useless. And vice versa: anything that seems advantageous to them is presented as the ultimate truth, imposed at all costs, insolently, by any means necessary. Those who disagree end up on their knees.
What I'm talking about now doesn't just concern Russia, and we're not the only ones worried about it. It concerns the entire system of international relations, and sometimes even the allies of the United States themselves. After the collapse of the USSR, the world was indeed reshaped, and the established norms of international law—the main, fundamental ones of which were adopted at the end of the Second World War and largely consolidated its outcomes—began to pose a problem for those who declared themselves victors of the Cold War.

Of course, in practical life, in international relations, and in the rules governing them, it was necessary to take into account the changes in the world situation and the very balance of power. But this should have been done professionally, gently, patiently, considering and respecting the interests of all countries and with full awareness of one's responsibility. But no: due to the euphoria of absolute superiority, a kind of modern form of absolutism, and in the context of a low level of general knowledge and the vanity of those who prepared, made, and promoted decisions that were profitable only for themselves, the situation took a different turn. Here are some ready-made examples. First, without any authorization from the UN Security Council, they conducted a bloody military operation against Belgrade, using aircraft and missiles in the very heart of Europe. Several weeks of continuous bombing of peaceful cities and vital infrastructure followed. It is necessary to recall these facts because some Western colleagues prefer not to remember these events, and when we discuss them, they prefer to refer not to the norms of international law, but to circumstances interpreted as they see fit.

Then came Iraq, Libya, and Syria. The illegitimate use of military force against Libya, the distortion of all UN Security Council resolutions on the Libyan question, led to the complete destruction of the state, the emergence of a massive hotbed of international terrorism, and the country's descent into a humanitarian catastrophe and the abyss of civil war, which lasted for several years and continues to this day. The tragedy, to which hundreds of thousands, millions of people were condemned, not only in Libya but throughout the region, triggered a massive exodus of migrants from North Africa and the Middle East to Europe.
A similar fate befell Syria. The military activities of the Western coalition on the territory of that country, without the consent of the Syrian government and without the sanction of the UN Security Council, are nothing less than aggression, an intervention.

However, the invasion of Iraq, which also had no legal basis, occupies a special place. As a pretext, they chose the supposedly reliable information that the United States possessed regarding the presence of weapons of mass destruction in Iraq. As proof, the US Secretary of State publicly waved, before the entire world, a tube filled with white powder, assuring everyone that it was a chemical weapon under development in Iraq. And then it turned out that it was all a manipulation, a bluff: there were no chemical weapons in Iraq. It's incredible, surprising, but the fact remains. There were lies at the highest levels of government and from the podium of the UN. And as a consequence, there were enormous sacrifices, destruction, and an incredible rise in terrorism.

In fact, it seems that practically everywhere, in many regions of the world, where the West tries to impose its order, it ends in bloody wounds that never heal, in the sores of international terrorism and extremism. Everything I've mentioned is the most blatant example, but it's by no means the only example of contempt for international law.

Added to this are the promises made to our country not to expand NATO an inch eastward. I repeat – they lied, or, in simpler terms, they just swindled us. Yes, we often hear that politics is dirty. Perhaps. But not to this extent! After all, such cheating behavior contradicts not only the principles of international relations, but above all, generally accepted standards of morality and ethics. Where is justice and truth here? There are only lies and hypocrisy.
Moreover, American politicians, political scientists, and journalists themselves are writing and speaking about the fact that a veritable "empire of lies" has been created in the United States in recent years. It's hard to disagree with that – it's the way it is. But let's not be modest: the United States remains a great country, a power with a leading role. All their satellites not only agree with them, with resignation and humility, joining their rhetoric for any reason whatsoever, but also copy their behavior, enthusiastically accepting the rules they propose. Therefore, we have every reason to assert with certainty that the entire so-called Western bloc, formed by the United States in its own image, is in its entirety this "empire of lies."

As for our country, after the collapse of the USSR, despite all the unprecedented openness of the new modern Russia, the willingness to cooperate honestly with the United States and other Western partners, and under conditions of almost unilateral disarmament, they immediately tried to go all the way, to finish us off, to destroy us completely. This is exactly what happened in the 1990s and early 2000s, when the so-called Western collective most actively supported separatism and mercenary gangs in southern Russia. What sacrifices, what losses did all this cause us? What trials did we have to endure before we finally broke the hold of international terrorism in the Caucasus? We remember it and will never forget it.

In fact, until recently, they never stopped trying to use us for their own interests, to destroy our traditional values, to impose their pseudo-values ​​on us, which would consume us—our people—from within. These are the same attitudes they are already aggressively imposing in their countries, and they lead directly to degradation and degeneration because they contradict human nature. It won't happen, and no one ever has. It won't work now either.
Nevertheless, in December 2021, we once again tried to reach an agreement with the United States and its allies on the principles for ensuring security in Europe and on non-enlargement of NATO. It was all in vain. The American position remains unchanged. They do not consider it necessary to negotiate with Russia on this crucial issue for us. While pursuing their own objectives, they are neglecting our interests.

And of course, in this situation, we ask ourselves: what to do next, what to expect? History teaches us that in 1940 and early 1941, the Soviet Union tried to prevent, or at least delay, war by any means necessary. To this end, it tried literally until the very last minute not to provoke a potential aggressor, failing to take or postponing the most necessary and obvious measures to prepare for and repel an inevitable attack. And the measures that were finally taken were dramatically late.
As a result, the country was not fully prepared to face the invasion of Nazi Germany, which attacked our Motherland without a declaration of war on June 22, 1941. The enemy was stopped and then crushed, but at a colossal cost. The attempt to appease the aggressor on the eve of the Great Patriotic War proved to be a costly mistake for our people. In the first months of fighting, we lost vast strategically important territories and millions of lives. We will not make such a mistake a second time; we have no right to.
Those who publicly claim world domination, with complete impunity and, I emphasize, without any justification, declare us, Russia, their enemy. Indeed, they now possess vast financial, scientific, technological, and military capabilities. We are aware of this and objectively assess the threats constantly directed at us in the economic sphere, as well as our capacity to resist this shameless and persistent blackmail. I repeat, we assess them without illusions, in a very realistic manner.

In the military sphere, modern Russia, even after the collapse of the USSR and the loss of much of its potential, remains one of the world's most powerful nuclear forces and also possesses advantages in a number of advanced weapons. Therefore, there should be no doubt that a direct attack against our country would result in defeat and disastrous consequences for any potential aggressor.

However, technologies, including defense technology, are evolving rapidly. Leadership in this field has changed and will continue to change hands, while the military conquest of territories adjacent to our borders, if we allow it to continue, will persist for decades or perhaps forever, posing an ever-greater and utterly unacceptable threat to Russia.
Even today, as NATO expands eastward, the situation for our country is deteriorating and becoming more dangerous every year. Furthermore, in recent days, NATO leaders have explicitly mentioned the need to accelerate, to force the advance of the Alliance's infrastructure toward Russia's borders. In other words, they are strengthening their position. We can no longer simply stand by and watch. That would be completely irresponsible of us.
The continued expansion of the Atlantic Alliance's infrastructure, the military conquest of Ukrainian territories that has begun, is unacceptable to us. The problem, of course, is not the NATO structure itself; it is merely an instrument of US foreign policy. The problem is that in the territories adjacent to us—and I would point out, in our own historical territories—an "anti-Russia" is being created, placed under total external control, actively colonized by the armed forces of NATO countries, and receiving an influx of the most modern weapons.

For the United States and its allies, this is what is termed Russia's policy of deterrence, with clear geopolitical dividends. And for our country, it is ultimately a matter of life or death, the question of our historical future as a people. And this is not an exaggeration—it is the truth. It is a real threat, not only to our interests, but to the very existence of our state, to its sovereignty. This is the same red line we have spoken of repeatedly. They have crossed it.

In this regard, [we must talk about] the situation in Donbas. We see that the forces that carried out a coup in Ukraine in 2014, seized power, and effectively maintain it through sham elections, have finally abandoned a peaceful resolution to the conflict. For eight years, eight infinitely long years, we did everything in our power to resolve the situation through peaceful and political means. All of this in vain.

As I said in my previous speech, we cannot look on without compassion at what is happening there. It was simply no longer possible to endure it. It was necessary to put an immediate end to this nightmare—to the genocide against the millions of people who live there, whose only hope is Russia, whose only hope is in us. It is these aspirations, these feelings, the suffering of these people that were our primary reason for deciding to recognize the People's Republics of Donbas.

Here is what I feel is important to emphasize further. The main NATO countries, to achieve their own objectives, are supporting extreme nationalists and neo-Nazis in Ukraine, who in turn will never forgive the Crimeans and the inhabitants of Sevastopol for their free choice—reunification with Russia.

Of course, they will go to Crimea, just as they will to Donbas, to wage war and kill, just like the punishers of the Ukrainian nationalist gangs, accomplices of Hitler during the Great Patriotic War, who massacred defenseless people. And they also openly declare that they are claiming a number of other Russian territories.
The entire course of events and the analysis of the information received show that a confrontation between Russia and these forces is inevitable. It is only a matter of time: they are preparing, they are waiting for a favorable moment. Now, they are also claiming possession of nuclear weapons. We will not allow this.
As I have already mentioned, after the collapse of the USSR, Russia accepted new geopolitical realities. We respect and will treat with respect all the newly formed countries in the post-Soviet space. We respect and will continue to respect their sovereignty, as evidenced by the assistance we provided to Kazakhstan, which faced tragic events and a challenge to its status as a state and its integrity. But Russia cannot feel secure, develop, or exist with a constant threat emanating from the territory of contemporary Ukraine.

I recall that in the years 2000-2005, we responded militarily to terrorists in the Caucasus, defended the integrity of our state, and preserved Russia. In 2014, we supported the Crimeans and the residents of Sevastopol. In 2015, we used our armed forces to create a reliable barrier to the infiltration of terrorists from Syria into Russia. We had no other way to protect ourselves.
The same thing is happening now. We have simply been left with no other option to protect Russia and our people except the one we must use today. The circumstances demand that we take decisive and immediate action. The Donbas People's Republics have requested assistance from Russia.

In this regard, in accordance with Article 51, Part 7, of the Charter of the United Nations, with the authorization of the Federation Council of Russia, and pursuant to the Treaties of Friendship and Mutual Assistance with the Donetsk People's Republic and the Luhansk People's Republic ratified by the Federal Assembly on February 22, I have decided to launch a special military operation.
Its objective is to protect those who have been suffering abuse and genocide at the hands of the Kyiv regime for the past eight years. To this end, we will strive to demilitarize and denazify Ukraine and bring to justice those who have committed numerous and bloody crimes against civilians, including citizens of the Russian Federation.
At the same time, we do not plan to occupy Ukrainian territory. We have no intention of imposing anything on anyone by force. However, we are hearing increasingly often in the West that the documents signed by the Soviet totalitarian regime, which enshrine the results of the Second World War, should no longer be applied. Well, what is the answer to that question?
The results of the Second World War are sacred, as are the sacrifices of our people on the altar of victory over Nazism. But this does not contradict the high values ​​of human rights and freedoms, based on the realities of all the postwar decades. Nor does it negate the right of nations to self-determination stipulated in Article 1 of the Charter of the United Nations.
I would like to remind you that neither during the creation of the USSR, nor after the Second World War, did anyone ever ask the inhabitants of certain territories that are part of present-day Ukraine how they themselves wished to organize their lives. Our policy is founded on freedom, the freedom of choice that allows everyone to independently determine their own future and that of their children. And we believe it is important that this right—the right to choose—be exercised by all people living on the territory of contemporary Ukraine, by all who wish to do so.

In this regard, I also address the citizens of Ukraine. In 2014, Russia was forced to protect the inhabitants of Crimea and Sevastopol from those whom you yourself call “Nazis.” The inhabitants of Crimea and Sevastopol chose to join their historical homeland, Russia, and we supported that. I repeat: it was simply impossible to do otherwise.
Today’s events are not related to a desire to harm the interests of Ukraine and the Ukrainian people; they are related to the need to protect Russia itself from those who have taken Ukraine hostage and are trying to use it against our country and its people. I repeat: our actions are acts of self-defense against the threats we face and against a disaster even greater than the one we are experiencing today. However difficult this may be, I ask you to understand and I call upon you to cooperate in order to turn this tragic page as quickly as possible and move forward together, allowing no one to interfere in our affairs or our relationships, but rather developing them independently. This will create the necessary conditions for resolving all problems and, despite the existence of borders between states, strengthen us from within, as if we were one. I believe this is our future.

I must also address the members of the Ukrainian Armed Forces. Dear comrades! It was not so that today's neo-Nazis could seize power in Ukraine that your fathers, grandfathers, and great-grandfathers fought against the Nazis, defending our common homeland. You swore allegiance to the Ukrainian people, not to the hostile junta that is plundering Ukraine and persecuting its people. Do not follow its criminal orders. I urge you to lay down your arms immediately and return home.

I want to make it clear: all members of the Ukrainian armed forces who comply with this demand will be free to leave the area of ​​hostilities and return to their families. Once again, I strongly emphasize: any responsibility for potential bloodshed will rest entirely on the conscience of the regime in power on the territory of Ukraine.
Now, a few important words, very important words for those who might be tempted to interfere in the current events. Anyone who tries to interfere with us, and even more so to create threats to our country, to our people, should know that Russia's response will be immediate and will lead to consequences you have never faced in your history. We are prepared for any development in the situation. All the necessary decisions in this regard have been made. I hope I will be heard.
Dear Russian citizens!
The well-being, the very existence of entire states and peoples, their success, their viability always originate in the powerful system of roots encompassing their culture and values, the experience and traditions of their ancestors, and, of course, depend directly on the ability to adapt quickly to a constantly changing life, on the cohesion of society, its will to consolidate itself, to gather all forces to move forward.
Forces are always necessary—always—but force can be of different kinds. The policy of the "empire of lies" that I mentioned at the beginning of my speech is based primarily on brute and direct force. In such cases, we say: "When there is force, there is no need to have anything between the ears." But we know that true strength lies in justice and truth—which is on our side. And if that is so, then it is difficult to disagree with the fact that strength and the will to fight are the foundations of independence and sovereignty, the necessary foundations and the only foundations upon which one can reliably build one's future, build one's home, establish one's family, and build one's homeland.

Dear compatriots!
I am confident that the soldiers and officers of the Russian Armed Forces who are loyal to their country will fulfill their duty with professionalism and courage. I have no doubt that all levels of government and the specialists responsible for the stability of our economy, financial system, and social sphere, as well as the leaders of our businesses and all sectors of the Russian business community, will work together harmoniously and effectively. I count on a united and patriotic stance from all parliamentary parties and public forces.

After all, as has always been the case throughout history, the destiny of Russia lies in the reliable hands of our multicultural people. This means that the decisions adopted will be implemented, our objectives will be achieved, and the security of our Homeland will be guaranteed. I believe in your support and the invincible strength that comes from love of country.

February 24, 2022

text:
О международной просветительской акции "Географический диктант" 2023

19 ноября 2023 г. на базе школы при Посольстве России в Исламабаде прошла международная просветительская акция "Географический диктант". Её основной целью является популяризация географических знаний и повышение интереса к географии России среди населения.

В мероприятии приняли участие сотрудники Посольства и члены их семей, а также учащиеся школы и учителя.

По окончании участникам были выданы памятные свидетельства.

Russian Foreign Ministry - МИД России

text: Совет Государственной Думы, в состав которого входят в том числе руководители фракций всех представленных в Государственной Думе политических партий, призывает ООН и МАГАТЭ, а также национальные парламенты, межпарламентские организации и органы: — дать принципиальную оценку преступным действиям Киева.— потребовать от властей Украины немедленного прекращения обстрелов ЗАЭС и других объектов, разрушение которых несет опасность радиоактивного, химического и биологического заражения и техногенной катастрофы.Совет Государственной Думы требует прекратить поставки на Украину вооружений, которыми антинародный киевский режим убивает и калечит людей, создает риск возникновения ядерной катастрофы.Обращаемся к гражданам Украины с просьбой осознать страшные последствия преступной и провокационной политики киевского режима.Совет Государственной Думы подтверждает готовность российской стороны сделать все необходимое для организации международной миссии МАГАТЭ на ЗАЭС с тем, чтобы специалисты агентства могли на месте засвидетельствовать наличие угроз, создаваемых в результате постоянных украинских атак на атомную электростанцию, чреватых трагическими последствиями для всего человечества».

title: Embaixada da Rússia no Brasil ✔
text: Начинаем «Русские сезоны» в Бразилии!Старт проекту дан на центральной площадке Рио-де-Жанейро - в Городском театре - гала-концертом Заслуженного артиста России Ильдара Абдразакова и лауреатов Международного конкурса им. П.И. Чайковского.Бразилия — первая страна Латинской Америки, которую посещают «Русские сезоны». В рамках проекта познакомим бразильскую публику с шедеврами отечественной классической культуры. Вслед за открытием программу «Сезонов» в Бразилии продолжат выступления Государственного академического русского народного ансамбля «Россия» им. Л.Г. Зыкиной и Академии Русского балета им. А.Я. Вагановой. Свои спектакли покажут Театр балета Бориса Эйфмана и Театр кукол им. С.В. Образцова. Также запланированы Неделя российского кино, выставки, лекции, мастер-классы.Завершит «Русские сезоны» в декабре Московский джазовый оркестр под управлением Игоря Бутмана.Уверена, блестящая  программа "Русских Сезонов" не оставит равнодушной бразильскую публику и станет частью истории сотрудничества России и Бразилии!
Google_Trans: The "Russian Seasons" are launching in Brazil! The project kicked off at the central venue of Rio de Janeiro, the City Theater, with a gala concert featuring Honored Artist of Russia Ildar Abdrazakov and laureates of the International Tchaikovsky Competition. Brazil is the first Latin American country to be visited by the "Russian Seasons." As part of the project, we will introduce Brazilian audiences to masterpieces of Russian classical culture. Following the opening, the "Seasons" program in Brazil will continue with performances by the State Academic Russian Folk Ensemble "Rossiya" named after L.G. Zykina and the Vaganova Academy of Russian Ballet. The Boris Eifman Ballet Theater and the S.V. Obraztsov Puppet Theater will also present their performances. Russian Film Week, exhibitions, lectures, and master classes are also planned. The Moscow Jazz Orchestra, conducted by Igor Butman, will conclude the Russian Seasons in December. I am confident that the brilliant program of the Russian Seasons will captivate Brazilian audiences and will become part of the history of cooperation between Russia and Brazil!

title: 🇷🇺🇹🇯Посольство России в Таджикистане
text: 💬 В.В.Путин в ходе церемонии подписания договоров о принятии в Россию ДНР, ЛНР, Запорожской области и Херсонской области и образовании новых субъектов Российской Федерации: Запад всё это время искал и продолжает искать новый шанс ударить по нам, ослабить и развалить Россию, о чём всегда мечтали, раздробить наше государство, стравить между собой народы, обречь их на нищету и вымирание. Им просто не даёт покоя, что в мире есть такая великая, огромная страна с её территорией, природными богатствами, ресурсами, с народом, который не умеет и никогда не будет жить по чужой указке. <...>Для них прямая угроза – наша мысль и философия, поэтому и покушаются на наших философов. Наша культура и искусство представляют для них опасность, поэтому пытаются их запретить. Наше развитие и процветание тоже для них угроза – конкуренция растёт.Им вообще не нужна Россия, она нужна нам.Читайте полностью
Google_Trans: 💬 Vladimir Putin, during the signing ceremony of the agreements on the accession of the DPR, LPR, Zaporizhzhia Oblast, and Kherson Oblast to Russia and the formation of new subjects of the Russian Federation: The West has always sought and continues to seek a new chance to strike us, to weaken and destroy Russia, as they have always dreamed of, to fragment our state, to pit peoples against each other, to condemn them to poverty and extinction. They are simply haunted by the fact that there is such a great, vast country in the world, with its territory, natural wealth, resources, and people who cannot and will never live by someone else's orders. <...> For them, our thought and philosophy are a direct threat, which is why they are attacking our philosophers. Our culture and art pose a danger to them, which is why they are trying to ban them. Our development and prosperity are also a threat to them – competition is growing. They don't need Russia at all; we need it. Read in full

title: 🇷🇺🇯🇵 Embassy of Russia in Japan
text: 🇷🇺🇺🇳Из выступления Постоянного представителя В.А.Небензи на заседании Совета Безопасности ООН по УкраинеЧитать полностью💬Украинская власть в очередной раз показала свое истинное и отнюдь не мирное лицо в марте 2022 года, когда отозвала свои же собственные реалистичные элементы мирного договора, которые мы были готовы обсуждать. Додумались ли в Киеве до этого рокового шага сами или послушали своих лондонских, вашингтонских или брюссельских кураторов, сейчас уже не столь важно. Главное, что именно тогда у киевского режима вопреки фактам и здравому смыслу сформировалась иллюзия о том, что при нарастающей прямой военной помощи НАТО она сможет победить Россию на поле боя. От этого опасного заблуждения украинский диктатор не может отойти до сих пор, хотя даже многие западные лидеры стали смотреть на ситуацию более трезво.В итоге Украина, по сути, превратилась в натовскую ЧВК. Ей платят деньги, снабжают оружием и разведданными, говорят куда стрелять и где атаковать. Страдает же от этого украинский народ, который заставляют воевать ради чужих задач.
Google_Trans: 🇷🇺🇺🇳From the speech of Permanent Representative V.A. Nebenzya at the UN Security Council meeting on Ukraine Read more💬The Ukrainian government once again showed its true and far from peaceful face in March 2022, when it withdrew its own realistic elements of a peace treaty that we were ready to discuss. Whether Kyiv came up with this fateful step on its own or listened to its London, Washington, or Brussels handlers is no longer so important. The main thing is that it was then that the Kyiv regime, contrary to facts and common sense, developed the illusion that with increasing direct military assistance from NATO, it could defeat Russia on the battlefield. The Ukrainian dictator has not yet been able to shake off this dangerous delusion, although even many Western leaders have begun to take a more sober view of the situation. As a result, Ukraine has essentially become a NATO private military company. They're paid, supplied with weapons and intelligence, told where to shoot and where to attack. But the Ukrainian people suffer as a result, forced to fight for someone else's agenda.

title: 🇷🇺🇯🇵 Embassy of Russia in Japan
text: 🚀宇宙飛行士の日おめでとうございます!🇷🇺今日、ロシアは人類初の宇宙飛行から6️⃣3️⃣周年を祝います。🧑🏼‍🚀1961年4月12日、人類の宇宙時代が幕を開けました。地球人として初めてユーリー・ガガーリンがソ連の宇宙船ボストークで軌道に打ち上げられ、これにより有人飛行の時代が幕を開け、ガガーリンは宇宙のパイオニアとしてその名が永遠に歴史に刻まれました。💫ガガーリンは「行くぞ！」と言い、人類を新たな宇宙ステージへと導きました！🚀歴史的な打ち上げは、後に宇宙基地となるバイコヌール実験場で行われ、そのときの発射台は今、ガガーリンの名を冠しています。⏰ 最初の宇宙飛行士の飛行時間は108分でした。
Google_Trans: 🚀Happy Cosmonaut Day!🇷🇺Today, Russia celebrates the 63rd anniversary of the first human spaceflight.🧑🏼‍🚀On April 12, 1961, the space age began. Yuri Gagarin became the first human to be launched into orbit aboard the Soviet spacecraft Vostok, ushering in the era of manned spaceflight, and Gagarin's name is forever etched in history as a pioneer of space.💫Gagarin said, "Let's go!" and led humanity to a new stage in space!🚀The historic launch took place at the Baikonur Proving Ground, which later became a space station, and the launch pad is now named after Gagarin.⏰The first cosmonaut's flight time was 108 minutes.

title: nan
text:
Comment by Foreign Ministry Spokeswoman Maria Zakharova on the Kiev regime’s recurrent terrorist attacks on Energodar

💬 On June 19 and 21 the Kiev regime launched new terrorist attacks using unmanned aerial vehicles against Energodar satellite city in the vicinity of Zaporozhskaya nuclear power plant (ZNPP) where its personnel and their families live.

☝️ This is not for the first time that the Zelensky’s regime vividly demonstrates its terrorist nature and complete disregard of peaceful nuclear facilities’ safety <...>.

Since the ZNPP was reunited with the Russian nuclear family, our country has been exerting much effort to create not only proper work conditions for the plant’s personnel but to raise the socio-economic level of life in Energodar and restore the relevant infrastructure. We do everything necessary to ensure that the people who live there have everything they need and are protected against criminal provocations by the Kiev junta.

In addition to the physical threat created by regular shelling, the ZNPP personnel and their families, including children, are subject to constant psychological pressure. They receive letters from Ukrainian special services containing threats to their lives and health. It seems that the Kiev regime is not going to abandon its policy of threats and emotionally draining blackmail against the ZNPP staff.

The systemic nature of the Kiev regime’s attacks both on the ZNPP and other Russian power engineering facilities shows an established and purposeful trend of inflicting an inacceptable damage to the Russian Federation economy and creating risks of technogenic accidents that may jeopardise nuclear safety on the entire European continent.

This way the Kiev regime continues to prove its terrorist nature.

❗️ Considering the inability of the Zelensky’s regime to negotiate, our country will take all necessary measures to make it impossible for it to deliver such strikes.

Read in full: https://t.me/RusEmbUK/1148

title: Ambasciata Russa in Italia/Посольство РФ в Италии
text: 🎙Интервью Н.П.Патрушева "Российской газете" в связи с открывающимся во вторник "саммите за демократию" (27 марта 2023 года)Читать полностьюОсновные тезисы:🔸 Организуемый нынешним аппаратом Белого дома "саммит за демократию", безусловно, проводится в рамках фактически стартовавшей президентской гонки США. Он станет очередным собранием в пользу мироустройства, где Вашингтон хочет вечно играть центральную роль. А инакомыслящим ожидаемо приклеят ярлык "недемократических государств".🔸 К месту и не к месту провозглашая демократические лозунги, на деле Вашингтон давно уже стал чемпионом по нарушению суверенитета государств, по числу развязанных войн и конфликтов, грубой и незаконной охоте на граждан других стран.🔸 Натовские инструкторы и советники обучают украинских военных, а наемники воюют в составе неонацистских батальонов. Пытаясь как можно дольше продлить это военное противостояние, они не скрывают своей главной цели - поражения России на поле боя и ее дальнейшего расчленения.🔸 В последнее десятилетие Запад реализует идею создания такого технологического уклада, при котором процветать должен лишь он, а остальному миру уготована участь периферии социально-экономического развития.🔸 Не в восторге Вашингтон и от стабильности в Азии, сложившейся в результате Второй мировой войны и освободительных движений. Индо-Тихоокеанская стратегия США является попыткой создать азиатское НАТО.🔸 Западники блокируют поставки российского зерна и удобрений за рубеж, а украинские закрома они попросту грабят и перепродают втридорога беднейшим странам на кабальных условиях, как делали их предки-колонизаторы.🔸 Проблема Америки в том, что она слишком заигралась в геополитические игры, позабыв о собственных насущных проблемах.🔸 Россия - исторический защитник суверенитета и государственности любых народов, которые обращались к ней за помощью. Она как минимум дважды спасала сами США - во время Войны за независимость и Гражданской войны.
Google_Trans: 🎙N.P. Patrushev's interview with Rossiyskaya Gazeta regarding the "Summit for Democracy" opening on Tuesday (March 27, 2023)Read in fullKey points:🔸 The "Summit for Democracy," organized by the current White House apparatus, is undoubtedly being held within the framework of the US presidential race, which has effectively begun. It will become yet another gathering in favor of a world order in which Washington wants to play a permanent central role. And dissenters will predictably be labeled "undemocratic states."🔸 While proclaiming democratic slogans in and out of place, Washington has long been a champion in violating the sovereignty of states, in the number of wars and conflicts unleashed, and in the brutal and illegal hunt for citizens of other countries.🔸 NATO instructors and advisers are training Ukrainian troops, and mercenaries are fighting in neo-Nazi battalions. Trying to prolong this military confrontation as long as possible, they do not hide their main goal - the defeat of Russia on the battlefield and its further dismemberment.🔸 In the last decade, the West has been pursuing the idea of ​​​​creating a technological order in which only it should prosper, while the rest of the world is destined for the periphery of socio-economic development.🔸 Washington is also not happy with the stability in Asia resulting from World War II and the liberation movements. The US Indo-Pacific strategy is an attempt to create an Asian NATO.🔸 Westerners are blocking the supply of Russian grain and fertilizer abroad, and they are simply plundering Ukrainian granaries and reselling them at exorbitant prices to the poorest countries under enslaving conditions, as their colonial ancestors did.🔸 America's problem is that it has become too caught up in geopolitical games, forgetting about its own pressing problems.🔸 Russia is the historical defender of the sovereignty and statehood of any people who have turned to it for help. She saved the United States itself at least twice - during the Revolutionary War and the Civil War.

title: Посольство России в Беларуси
text: ⚡️ В Минске состоялось мероприятие в формате открытого диалога на тему «Преступления украинского режима»👥 Участие в мероприятии приняли Посол по особым поручениям МИД России Родион Мирошник, член Комитета Совета Федерации по международным делам Наталья Никонорова и Уполномоченная по правам человека в ДНР Дарья Морозова. 📷 Состоялась презентация документальной экспозиции «Военные преступления киевского режима», подготовленной на базе фотографий агентства ТАСС, МИЦ «Известия» и журналиста Александра Гаюка. 🇷🇺 В приветствии участникам открытого диалога Посол России Борис Грызлов отметил:💬 Действия украинских властей – это составляющая общей политики Запада по наращиванию угроз безопасности России. В этом кроется корень трагедии Украины. Братскую и родственную нам страну внешние силы стали превращать в уродливый антипод России, насильно разрывать политические, гуманитарные и экономические связи, искусственно насаждать чуждые ценности.➡️ Подробнее@miroshnik_r@SenatorNikonorova@aupch_dnr
Google_Trans: ⚡️ An open dialogue event on "Crimes of the Ukrainian Regime" was held in Minsk.👥 Ambassador-at-Large of the Russian Ministry of Foreign Affairs Rodion Miroshnik, member of the Federation Council Committee on International Affairs Natalya Nikonorova, and Human Rights Commissioner for the DPR Darya Morozova participated in the event. 📷 A presentation of the documentary exhibition "War Crimes of the Kyiv Regime" was held, based on photographs from the TASS news agency, the Izvestia International Information Center, and journalist Alexander Gayuk. 🇷🇺 In his greeting to the open dialogue participants, Russian Ambassador Boris Gryzlov noted:💬 The actions of the Ukrainian authorities are part of a general Western policy of increasing threats to Russia's security. This is the root of Ukraine's tragedy. title: Ambasciata Russa in Italia/Посольство РФ в Италии
text: 🎙️ Dall’intervento di Alexey Paramonov, Ambasciatore della Federazione Russa in Italia, alla Conferenza delle associazioni per la promozione dell’amicizia tra la Russia e l’Italia (29 marzo 2025, Roma) • Il vostro operato contribuisce a costituire proprio quella massa critica dotata di buon senso la quale, sovente, è in grado di rallentare o addirittura di inibire quel volano di propaganda antirussa che in Italia gira vorticosamente, e che purtroppo nutre delle sue narrazioni menzognere i vertici del Paese. I nostri interlocutori ufficiali, ovvero gli esponenti del Governo, del Parlamento e del Ministero degli Esteri, non hanno alcuna intenzione di fermarsi a guardare quanto sta accadendo in maniera obiettiva, di valutare la situazione con lucidità, né di riflettere sulla necessità di smetterla di procedere in direzione di una guerra contro la Russia, che comporterebbe conseguenze assolutamente drammatiche per le sorti dell’Europa e del mondo intero.• Si insidia nelle menti e nei cuori degli europei, l’idea secondo cui la Russia sarebbe una “potenza di seconda categoria, che non ha il diritto di dettare all’Europa le sue condizioni”. E tutto questo viene affiancato dai continui tentativi di falsificare la storia. Le menti delle giovani generazioni sono sottoposte a un martellamento continuo, con il quale si vuole inculcare in loro l’idea che “Mosca non ha mai sconfitto il nazismo nella Seconda Guerra Mondiale”. Si ha quasi la sensazione che a Bruxelles si siano ormai stancati della loro stessa viscida retorica sulla democrazia e sulla libertà di parola e che ormai, senza più farne mistero, abbiano adottato i metodi di manipolazione della coscienza collettiva che erano tipici del nazismo. Evidentemente, il famoso principio di Goebbels secondo cui “Più grande è la menzogna, più è prababile che la gente ci creda” dev’essersi impresso saldamente nelle menti dei burocrati europei.• Mentre invece l’Unione Europea, da parte sua, sta cercando di metterci i bastoni tra le ruote e sta facendo di tutto per ostacolare il processo di pace. Il programma di riarmo promosso dai vertici dell’Unione Europea rischia di impoverire i cittadini europei e di trasformarsi in un riarmo incontrollato della Germania, la quale, come ben ricordiamo, alla fine degli anni Trenta del secolo scorso si tramutò nel Terzo Reich. Oggi è ancora possibile che si ripeta una cosa del genere? Sì, è del tutto possibile. […] In Europa si sta promuovendo la tesi secondo cui la Russia, dopo l’Ucraina, potrebbe e, anzi, vorrebbe attaccare l’Europa! Si sta cercando di convincere la popolazione europea del fatto che sussiste una “minaccia esistenziale” proveniente dalla Russia, minaccia che sarebbe forse possibile scongiurare soltanto attraverso la demolizione dello Stato russo.• Come voi probabilmente già sapete, l’Italia è stata inserita nella lista dei Paesi ostili alla Russia. E il fatto che si trovi nella lista è assolutamente giustificato. Dopotutto, è proprio in questa luce che noi vediamo il Governo italiano. Come ha affermato il Ministro degli Affari Esteri della Federazione Russa Sergey Lavrov, “non esistono, e non possono esistere popoli che a priori siano ostili nei confronti dei russi”. Il nostro Paese è sempre stato un centro di attrazione e un punti di riferimento morale per coloro che hanno a cuore gli ideali della pace mondiale, della giustizia, dell’amicizia e della cooperazione, e da sempre si impegna a diffondere quelli che sono i valori tradizionali: tanto che oggi si recano a vivere e a lavorare da noi, con grande speranza, quelle persone che sono rimaste deluse dall’Occidente e dai suoi cosiddetti valori. Il nostro Paese non si è mai chiuso nei confronti di nessuno, e anzi è pronto a spalancare le sue porte a coloro che giungono animati da intenzioni pure e da buoni sentimenti.🔗 Il testo integrale
Google_Trans: 🎙️ From the speech by Alexey Paramonov, Ambassador of the Russian Federation to Italy, at the Conference of Associations for the Promotion of Friendship between Russia and Italy (29 March 2025, Rome) • Your work contributes to building precisely that critical mass endowed with common sense which, often, is able to slow down or even inhibit the flywheel of anti-Russian propaganda that is swirling wildly in Italy, and which unfortunately feeds the country's leaders with its lying narratives. Our official interlocutors, namely representatives of the Government, Parliament, and the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, have no intention of stopping to look objectively at what is happening, of assessing the situation clearly, nor of reflecting on the need to stop moving towards a war against Russia, which would entail absolutely dramatic consequences for the fate of Europe and the entire world. The idea that Russia is a "second-rate power, with no right to dictate its terms to Europe," is taking root in the minds and hearts of Europeans. And all of this is accompanied by constant attempts to falsify history. The minds of the younger generations are subjected to constant bombardment, with the aim of instilling in them the idea that "Moscow never defeated Nazism in the Second World War." One almost gets the sense that Brussels has grown tired of its own slimy rhetoric about democracy and free speech and has now, without making a secret of it, adopted the methods of manipulating the collective conscience that were typical of Nazism. Evidently, Goebbels's famous principle that "The bigger the lie, the more likely people are to believe it" must have become firmly imprinted on the minds of European bureaucrats. Meanwhile, the European Union, for its part, is trying to put a spoke in our wheels and is doing everything it can to hinder the peace process. The rearmament program promoted by the European Union's leaders risks impoverishing European citizens and turning into an uncontrolled rearmament of Germany, which, as we well remember, transformed into the Third Reich in the late 1930s. Is it still possible for something like this to happen today? Yes, it is entirely possible. […] In Europe, the thesis is being promoted that Russia, after Ukraine, could and, indeed, would like to attack Europe! They are trying to convince the European population that there is an "existential threat" from Russia, a threat that could perhaps only be averted by the demolition of the Russian state. • As you probably already know, Italy has been included in the list of countries hostile to Russia. And its presence on the list is absolutely justified. After all, it is precisely in this light that we see the Italian government. As Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov stated, "there do not exist, and cannot exist, peoples who are a priori hostile towards the Russians." Our country has always been a center of attraction and a moral reference point for those who cherish the ideals of world peace, justice, friendship, and cooperation. It has always been committed to spreading traditional values, so much so that today those who have been disillusioned by the West and its so-called values ​​come to live and work here with great hope. Our country has never closed itself off to anyone, and indeed, it is ready to throw open its doors to those who come motivated by pure intentions and good feelings. 🔗 The full text

title: Посольство России в Казахстане
text: Вниманию наших подписчиков из Алматы!Сегодня, 22 сентября в 19:00 в ТЦ Апорт (ул. Айтиева, 10, 2 этаж, рядом с аквапарком «Hawaii») состоится встреча с известным путешественником и исследователем Темирланом Беркимбаевым. В августе этого года он стал участником программы Россотрудничества «Новое поколение» и вошел в состав  международной исследовательской экспедиции «Камчатка: Северо-западное огненное кольцо». Об этой увлекательной, полной приключений, поездке он и расскажет на встрече. На встрече речь пойдет о:- богатейших природных ресурсах Камчатского края;- удивительном по красоте природном парке Налычево;- коварных медведях и редких животных;- современном экотуризме;- легендарных вулканах Камчатки.По окончании состоится показ одного из лучших фильмов о путешествиях «Невероятная жизнь Уолтера Митти».Для наших столичных подписчиков сообщаем: в октябре вместе со своими товарищами по экспедиции Темирлан Беркимбаев выступит в Астане.
Google_Trans: Attention our subscribers from Almaty! Today, September 22, at 7:00 PM, the Aport Shopping Center (10 Aitieva Street, 2nd floor, next to the Hawaii Water Park) will host a meeting with renowned traveler and explorer Temirlan Berkimbayev. This August, he became a participant in Rossotrudnichestvo's "New Generation" program and joined the international research expedition "Kamchatka: Northwestern Ring of Fire." He will talk about this exciting, adventurous trip at the meeting. The meeting will cover: - the Kamchatka Krai's rich natural resources; - the stunningly beautiful Nalychevo Nature Park; - wily bears and rare animals; - modern ecotourism; - the legendary volcanoes of Kamchatka. Following the meeting, there will be a screening of one of the best travel films, "The Secret Life of Walter Mitty." For our Moscow subscribers, we inform you: in October, Temirlan Berkimbaev, along with his expedition mates, will perform in Astana.

title: nan
text:
A continuación - el discurso de bienvenida del Embajador de Rusia en Chile Sergei N. Koshkin pronunciado en el acto solemne de entrega de una partícula de la Llama Eterna de la Tumba del Soldado Desconocido, 8 de mayo de 2023:

🔽🔽🔽🔽

Queridos amigos,

Hoy celebramos el 78º Aniversario de la Victoria del pueblo soviético en la Gran Guerra Patria. De nuestra Victoria común: de los rusos, bielorrusos, ucranianos, de otros pueblos de la Unión Soviética en la lucha sangrienta contra el nazismo.

Ha pasado tiempo. Y hoy en día algunos en el Occidente están tratando de hacer que los pueblos de sus países olviden nuestra lucha común y nuestra Victoria común. Los rusos no podemos permitirnos olvidar. Para nosotros olvidar es traicionar. Traicionar la memoria de nuestros padres, madres, abuelos y abuelas, traicionar la historia de nuestro pueblo.

Cada familia rusa ahora recuerda a sus seres queridos – Héroes Libertadores o aquellos que fallecieron en estos años terribles. La Guerra cobró 27 millones de vidas de ciudadanos soviéticos. Para imaginar esto, recordemos que la población de un país como Chile, donde estamos hoy, es de 19 millones. La población en su totalidad: hombres, mujeres, ancianos, niños pequeños. Se fueron, eliminados de la vida.

¿Nos piden que lo olvidemos?

Nos proponen cerrar nuestros ojos para no ver cómo se está resurgiendo el nazismo en los países europeos, como hoy en día se están realizando desfiles de veteranos de las tropas de Waffen-SS, se está honrando a los verdugos nazis, se están quemando libros en ruso. Para no ver cómo los soldados de los batallones nacionalistas ucranianos llevan con orgullo esvástica, ejecutan a los prisioneros de guerra, maltratan a los civiles.

Olvidar para nosotros es traicionar. Traicionar a nuestros hijos que ahora luchan contra el nazismo en Ucrania. Nunca jamás. Y mientras recordemos este Día, somos invencibles.

Entre los que recuerdan están nuestros amigos. Ellos están aquí con nosotros hoy. Son los chilenos con los que compartimos las visiones, representantes de las fuerzas progresistas y sanas de este país. Démosles la bienvenida.

Hoy tenemos con nosotros a los Embajadores de los Estados amigos de América Latina, nuestros buenos viejos amigos, compañeros de lucha, representantes de Cuba, Venezuela y Nicaragua. Hoy, más que nunca, vale mucho su apoyo. Démosles la bienvenida.

Hoy, como nuestros heroicos antepasados hace muchos años, estamos convencidos: ¡nuestra causa es justa, el nazismo será derrotado, la victoria será nuestra!

¡Felicidades, amigos!

¡Viva la Victoria!

#DíadelaVictoria
#Victoria78
Google_Trans:
The following is the welcoming address by the Ambassador of Russia to Chile, Sergei N. Koshkin, delivered at the solemn ceremony for the laying of a fragment of the Eternal Flame at the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier, May 8, 2023:

🔽🔽🔽🔽

Dear friends,

Today we celebrate the 78th anniversary of the Victory of the Soviet people in the Great Patriotic War. Our shared victory: the victory of Russians, Belarusians, Ukrainians, and other peoples of the Soviet Union in the bloody struggle against Nazism.

Time has passed. And today, some in the West are trying to make the people of their countries forget our common struggle and our shared victory. We Russians cannot afford to forget. For us, to forget is to betray. To betray the memory of our fathers, mothers, grandfathers, and grandmothers, to betray the history of our people.

Every Russian family now remembers their loved ones—Heroes of the Liberation or those who perished in those terrible years. The war claimed 27 million Soviet lives. To grasp this, consider that the population of a country like Chile, where we are today, is 19 million. The entire population: men, women, the elderly, young children. Gone, wiped from life.

Are they asking us to forget?

They are proposing that we close our eyes to the resurgence of Nazism in European countries, to the parades of Waffen-SS veterans taking place today, to the honoring of Nazi executioners, to the burning of Russian books. To avoid seeing how soldiers of Ukrainian nationalist battalions proudly wear swastikas, execute prisoners of war, and mistreat civilians.

For us, to forget is to betray. Betray our children who are now fighting against Nazism in Ukraine. Never again. And as long as we remember this Day, we are invincible.

Among those who remember are our friends. They are here with us today. They are the Chileans with whom we share our vision, representatives of the progressive and healthy forces of this country. Let us welcome them.

Today we have with us the Ambassadors of the friendly Latin American States, our good old friends, comrades in arms, representatives of Cuba, Venezuela, and Nicaragua. Today, more than ever, their support is invaluable. Let us welcome them.

Today, like our heroic ancestors many years ago, we are convinced: our cause is just, Nazism will be defeated, victory will be ours!

Congratulations, friends!

Long live Victory!

#VictoryDay
#Victory78

title: Russian Embassy in South Africa
text: В свете приближающегося Дня России и в связи с 350-летием со дня рождения Петра I мы бы хотели рассказать вам о "Медном всаднике".Этот памятник Петру Великому, установленный в 1782 г. на Сенатской площади в Санкт-Петербурге, сегодня является одной из самых узнаваемых достопримечательностей города.Благодаря А.С.Пушкину и его одноименной поэме, с 1833 г. памятник известен в России как "медный всадник", хотя отлит он из бронзы. Грандиозную скульптуру создал француз Этьен-Морис Фальконе. По указанию императрицы Екатерины II на постаменте памятника была помещена надпись: "Петру Первому. Екатерина Вторая" (и по-латински - "Petro Primo Catharina Secunda"). Таким образом императрица подчеркнула приверженность петровским преобразованиям.Постамент памятника - невероятных размеров "Гром-камень", самый большой мегалит, который когда-либо перемещали люди.Переходите по ссылке, чтобы узнать больше ➡️ is.gd/lEiB6T#ДеньРоссии #ДеньРоссии2022 #МыРоссия
Google_Trans: In light of the approaching Russia Day and the 350th anniversary of Peter the Great's birth, we would like to tell you about the Bronze Horseman. This monument to Peter the Great, erected in 1782 on Senate Square in St. Petersburg, is today one of the city's most recognizable landmarks. Thanks to A.S. Pushkin and his poem of the same name, the monument has been known in Russia as the "Bronze Horseman" since 1833, even though it is cast in bronze. This magnificent sculpture was created by the Frenchman Étienne-Maurice Falconet. At the direction of Empress Catherine II, the inscription on the monument's pedestal reads: "To Peter the Great. Catherine the Second" (and in Latin, "Petro Primo Catharina Secunda"). In this way, the Empress emphasized her commitment to Peter the Great's reforms. The monument's pedestal is the incredibly large "Thunder Stone," the largest megalith ever moved by humans. Follow the link to learn more ➡️ is.gd/lEiB6T #RussiaDay #RussiaDay2022 #WeAreRussia

text:
Over a thousand Africans were recently converted to Orthodoxy by Russian priests. People from Tanzania and Malawi were trained by catechists before being baptised and becoming members of the church. See how the sacrament was carried out in our video.

The Russian Orthodox Church mission is vast in Africa. Besides the development of liturgical life, many humanitarian and educational projects are being conducted there by Patriarchal Exarchate of Africa. It was created in 2021 after the Patriarch of Alexandria, whose canonical territory was considered to be Africa, recognised the Ukrainian schism. Dozens of African clerics who disagreed with this decision then asked to be admitted to the Russian Orthodox Church. In response to the requests of African clerics, the Synod in Moscow established an exarchate. 
  

RT Documentary

title: nan
text:
Xi Jinping exhorte les jeunes à travers le détroit de Taiwan à s’efforcer de réaliser le renouveau national
 
Xi Jinping, secrétaire général du Comité central du Parti communiste chinois, a exhorté le 11 juillet les jeunes à travers le Détroit, dans une lettre en réponse aux jeunes de Taiwan, à s’efforcer conjointement de réaliser le rêve chinois du grand renouveau national.
Xi Jinping a déclaré dans cette lettre qu’il était heureux d’apprendre que les jeunes de Taiwan avaient tissé des liens avec la partie continentale par le biais du Forum des jeunes du Détroit, qu’ils avaient trouvé une scène sur la partie continentale pour réaliser leurs rêves, qu’ils avaient été témoins du développement et des changements rapides de la mère patrie et qu’ils avaient ressenti les sentiments chaleureux entre les compatriotes des deux côtés du détroit de Taiwan qui ne forment qu’une seule famille.
Selon Xi Jinping, un pays est prospère quand sa jeunesse est prospère, et un pays est fort quand sa jeunesse l’est aussi. L’avenir de la patrie et de la nation chinoise repose sur la jeunesse. Nous créerons, comme toujours, des conditions favorables pour que les jeunes des deux rives du Détroit puissent apprendre les uns des autres, en offrant plus de facilités aux jeunes taiwanais pour étudier, travailler, créer des entreprises et vivre dans la partie continentale. Il a encouragé ces jeunes à raconter à leurs pairs de Taiwan leurs parcours dans la partie continentale et à partager avec eux leurs réflexions, afin que davantage de jeunes taiwanais comprennent la partie continentale, qu’ils travaillent, de concert et sans relâche, avec les jeunes de la patrie, et que leur jeunesse s’épanouisse dans la réalisation du rêve chinois du grand renouveau national.
Fondé en 2003, le Forum des jeunes du Détroit est co-organisé par la Fédération nationale de la jeunesse de Chine, l’Association chinoise pour les échanges des jeunes (Taiwan) et l’Association générale du travail concernant la jeunesse du Kuomintang de Chine. Il s’agit d’une plateforme importante pour les échanges de jeunes à travers le détroit de Taiwan. Du 11 au 12 juillet, sa 20e édition s’est tenue à Xiamen, dans la province du Fujian. Dans une lettre récemment adressée à Xi Jinping, les cinquante jeunes participants de Taiwan ont décrit leurs expériences d’études, de travail et de vie dans la partie continentale, et exprimé leur ferme détermination à contribuer au renouveau national et à la réunification de la patrie.
Google_Trans:
Xi Jinping Urges Youth Across the Taiwan Strait to Strive for National Rejuvenation

Xi Jinping, General Secretary of the Communist Party of China Central Committee, urged youth across the Taiwan Strait, in a letter to Taiwanese youth on July 11, to jointly strive to realize China’s dream of great national rejuvenation.

Xi Jinping stated in the letter that he was pleased to learn that Taiwanese youth had forged ties with the mainland through the Taiwan Strait Youth Forum, found a platform on the mainland to realize their dreams, witnessed the rapid development and changes of the motherland, and felt the warm feelings between compatriots on both sides of the Taiwan Strait who are one family.

According to Xi Jinping, a country prospers when its youth prospers, and a country is strong when its youth prospers. The future of the Chinese motherland and nation rests on its youth. We will, as always, create favorable conditions for young people on both sides of the Taiwan Strait to learn from one another, providing more opportunities for Taiwanese youth to study, work, start businesses, and live on the mainland. He encouraged these young people to share their experiences and reflections with their Taiwanese peers, so that more Taiwanese youth will understand the mainland, work together tirelessly with their counterparts on the mainland, and flourish in the realization of the Chinese dream of great national rejuvenation.

Founded in 2003, the Taiwan Strait Youth Forum is co-organized by the All-China Youth Federation, the China Youth Exchange Association (Taiwan), and the Kuomintang General Youth Work Association of China. It serves as an important platform for youth exchange across the Taiwan Strait. From July 11 to 12, its 20th edition was held in Xiamen, Fujian Province. In a letter recently addressed to Xi Jinping, the fifty young participants from Taiwan described their experiences of studying, working, and living on the mainland, and expressed their firm determination to contribute to national renewal and the reunification of the motherland.

text:
⚔️ Владимир Путин направил поздравления участникам и гостям торжественных мероприятий, посвящённых 80-летию прихода первого союзного конвоя в порт #Архангельск. 

💬 Владимир #Путин: история арктических конвоев – важная часть летописи Второй мировой войны. Налаженные союзниками морские поставки вооружений, военной техники, продовольствия и стратегического сырья помогли сорвать планы гитлеровского руководства, рассчитывавшего на изоляцию нашей страны, стали ярким символом объединения усилий в противостоянии нацистской агрессии.

Первому конвою, который стал известен под кодовым названием «Дервиш», посчастливилось избежать потерь. Однако большинство из тех сорока конвоев, которые в последующие годы шли в наши северные порты, столкнулось с тяжелейшими испытаниями: были потеряны десятки судов и кораблей сопровождения, погибли тысячи моряков.

В России свято чтят подвиги тех, кто принимал участие в Северных конвоях, помним о вкладе в победу над нацизмом всех стран антигитлеровской коалиции.

Рассчитываю, что память о боевом братстве военной поры послужит развитию конструктивного международного диалога и взаимодействия в борьбе с угрозами и вызовами современности.

Vladimir Putin sent congratulations to the participants and guests of the celebrations marking the 80th anniversary of the arrival of the first Allied convoy in the port of #Arkhangelsk.

💬Vladimir #Putin: The history of the Arctic convoys is an important part of the annals of World War II. The maritime supplies of weapons, military equipment, food, and strategic raw materials established by the Allies helped thwart the plans of the Nazi leadership, which hoped to isolate our country, and became a striking symbol of the unified efforts to resist Nazi aggression.

The first convoy, codenamed "Dervish," was fortunate to escape losses. However, most of the forty convoys that sailed to our northern ports in the following years faced dire trials: dozens of ships and escorts were lost, and thousands of sailors perished.

In Russia, the heroic deeds of those who participated in the Arctic Convoys are sacredly honored, and we remember the contribution of all countries of the anti-Hitler coalition to the victory over Nazism.

I hope that the memory of the military brotherhood of the war will serve to develop constructive international dialogue and cooperation in the fight against the threats and challenges of our time.

text:
🎙 New Year Address by Russian Permanent Representative to the UN Office in Geneva, Ambassador Gennady Gatilov:

**************

🇷🇺 Another year has flown by, almost in the blink of an eye. Our country has successfully overcome all challenges and trials of 2024. Once again, we have shown our unwavering resolve, unity, and the inherent pursuit of justice that defines our multiethnic people.

⭐️ 2025 will be marked by a momentous occasion: the 80th anniversary of the Soviet people’s Victory in the Great Patriotic War. I am confident that 2025 will be victorious for Russia in every sense of the word. As descendants of the heroes who liberated Europe from the horrors of Nazism, it is our solemn duty to honor this anniversary with dignity, to carefully preserve and protect the memory of the heroic deed of our ancestors.

🇺🇳 We will fulfill this mission here, in international Geneva, consistently ensuring that Russia’s voice, along with the voices of those who share our principles, is always heard. It is heartening to see that an increasing number of people worldwide recognize justice and equality as the cornerstone of the sustainable world order that we champion. We will continue advancing these efforts, promoting a multipolar world founded on respect for sovereignty and interests of all nations, preservation of their cultural and spiritual traditions, their cultural diversity and historical peculiarities.

🤝 I extend my most heartfelt holiday greetings to our dear compatriots and to all our colleagues in the diplomatic community. May you enjoy robust health, unwavering spirit, and enduring optimism, along with peace and prosperity. May 2025 bring every success in all your endeavors and fill your homes with warmth, joy, and love.

🎄Have a happy New Year and a merry Orthodox Christmas!

#NewYear2025

title: Посольство России в Габоне / Ambassade de Russie au Gabon
text: 🕯 22 июня – одна из самых трагических, скорбных дат в истории нашей страны. Восемьдесят три года назад началась Великая Отечественная война, которая продлилась 1418 дней и унесла жизни почти 27 миллионов советских граждан.#ВЭтотДень в 1941 году в 3.30 утра фашистская Германия напала на нашу страну без объявления войны. Были нанесены массированные удары по аэродромам, железнодорожным узлам и городам на глубину 250-300 км от государственной границы. Советско-германский фронт стал главным фронтом Второй мировой войны.📻 «Наше дело правое. Враг будет разбит. Победа будет за нами!»  – эти слова из обращения народного комиссара иностранных дел В.М.Молотова вошли в историю и оказались пророческими. Ценой невосполнимых потерь наша страна внесла решающий вклад в разгром Третьего рейха, освободила от нацистской чумы всю Европу и спасла мир.Вечная слава павшим за свободу и независимость нашей Родины!🎥 © Российское военно-историческое общество
Google_Trans: 🕯 June 22 is one of the most tragic and sorrowful dates in the history of our country. Eighty-three years ago, the Great Patriotic War began, lasting 1,418 days and claiming the lives of nearly 27 million Soviet citizens. #OnThisDay in 1941, at 3:30 a.m., Nazi Germany attacked our country without declaring war. Massive strikes were launched against airfields, railway junctions, and cities 250-300 km from the state border. The Soviet-German front became the main front of World War II. 📻 "Our cause is just. The enemy will be defeated. Victory will be ours!" – these words from an address by People's Commissar for Foreign Affairs V.M. Molotov entered history and proved prophetic. At the cost of irreparable losses, our country made a decisive contribution to the defeat of the Third Reich, liberated all of Europe from the Nazi plague, and saved the world. Eternal glory to those who fell for the freedom and independence of our Motherland! 🎥 © Russian Military Historical Society

title: РИА КАТЮША
text: 📌 Андрей Цыганов: Сейчас такое время, когда каждый должен не бояться, а действовать – и возвращать страну к ее корнямВыдержки из выступления главреда РИА «Катюша» Андрея Цыганова на конференции в Обнинске (Калужская область), посвященной защите традиционных духовно-нравственных ценностей (выступление целиком – см. в видео):«Любой родитель понимает, что воспитать личность можно только на личном примере. Поэтому мы настаиваем на том, что роль родителей, отца, роль учителя должна быть главной в воспитании. Последние десятилетия мы видим, что процесс деградации в образовании и других сферах ускорился, потому что т.н. правящие элиты служат мамоне, поставив деньги в центр своего мироздания.Развал школьного образования начался с принижения роли учителя, а затем взялись за семью. Родители вынуждены много работать, к тому же их постоянно запугивают всевозможными ювенальными технологиями, в итоге дети проводят лгромное количество времени в интернете, в компьютерных играх, что ведет к атомизации общества.Сегодня дети, подростки проводят в интернете, в соцсетях времени больше, чем в школе, в семье, с родителями. Контролирующие их «новые демиурги», владельцы крупнейших соцсетей, честно говорят, что для них главное – больший охват пользователей, рентабельность, количество просмотров и т.д. Все это предельно далеко от нравственности, от морали, от воспитания здорового поколения. Игры у нас тоже почти все западные, они почти все расположены на западных серверах. Там происходит и прошивка сознания, и вербовка новых адептов «скулшутинга», и пропаганда извращений. Это никакие не выдумки, но все это почему-то продвигается на федеральном уровне.Наш социальный блок очень любит по-своему толковать ФЗ «О профилактике безнадзорности…», Семейный кодекс… нам приходится с этим бороться – все это вместо траты времени и ресурсов на реальную поддержку семей. То есть вместо помощи родителям и детям получается «раннее выявление семейного неблагополучия» или что-то в таком духе. Мы часто слышим от президента очень хорошие и правильные слова, но на местах все реализуется иначе. В итоге получается, как было сказано в одном из сообщений на прямой линии президента: «Дай Бог нам всем жить в стране, о которой говорит Владимир Владимирович!»Испытания, которые сегодня нам посланы, являются шансом к возвращению к своим корням. Что же делать каждому из нас сегодня, на своем месте? Если мы осознаем себя как чсчть народа- субъекта истории, надо начинать перехватывать инициативу. Для цензуры в СМИ и интернете – писать заявления. Если мы предприниматели – зачем нанимать на работу мигрантов? В медиасреде мы должны популяризировать нормальные семьи. На каждом уровне есть огромное количество возможностей, чтобы продвигать наши традиции и ценности. Наша организация, ОУЗС, вместе с такими же родительскими обьединениями, добилась снятия с пробега многих токсичных законопроектов, изгнания из страны ряда иноагентов и прочих вырожденцев. В частности, недавно была принята поправка в ФЗ «Об образовании», запрещающая использование смартфонов (и любых «учебных» приложений на них, естественно) в образовательном процессе.Поэтому призываю вас всех проявлять активность – не бояться, а действовать! И у нас обязательно все получится».✅ https://youtu.be/ZBSXb-q0KEs
Google_Trans: 📌 Andrey Tsyganov: Now is the time when everyone must not be afraid, but act—and return the country to its roots. Excerpts from a speech by RIA Katyusha editor-in-chief Andrey Tsyganov at a conference in Obninsk (Kaluga Region) dedicated to the protection of traditional spiritual and moral values ​​(see the full speech in the video): “Any parent understands that a person can only be raised by personal example. Therefore, we insist that the role of parents, fathers, and teachers must be paramount in upbringing. In recent decades, we have seen the process of degradation in education and other spheres accelerate because the so-called ruling elites serve mammon, placing money at the center of their worldview. The collapse of school education began with the belittling of the teacher, and then they moved on to the family. Parents are forced to work long hours and are constantly intimidated by all sorts of juvenile technologies. As a result, children spend enormous amounts of time online and playing computer games, leading to the atomization of society. Today, children and teenagers spend more time online and on social media than they do at school, at home, or with their parents. The "new demiurges" who control them, the owners of the largest social networks, frankly say that their main goals are greater user reach, profitability, viewership, and so on. All of this is extremely far removed from morality, ethics, and the upbringing of a healthy generation. Almost all of our games are Western, and they are almost all hosted on Western servers. This is where the mind-boggling, the recruitment of new "school-shooting" adherents, and the promotion of perversions take place. This isn't fiction, but for some reason, all of this is being pushed at the federal level. Our social sector is very fond of interpreting the Federal Law "On the Prevention of Child Neglect..." and the Family Code in its own way... we have to fight this—all this instead of spending time and resources on genuine support for families. So, instead of helping parents and children, we get "early detection of family problems" or something like that. We often hear very good and correct words from the president, but at the local level, things are implemented differently. The end result is, as was said in one of the messages during the president's direct line: "May God grant us all to live in the country Vladimir Vladimirovich speaks of!" The trials we are facing today are a chance to return to our roots. What should each of us do today, in our own place? If we recognize ourselves as part of a people—the subject of history—we must begin to seize the initiative. To censor the media and the internet, we need to file statements. If we are entrepreneurs, why hire migrants? We must promote normal families in the media. There are countless opportunities at every level to promote our traditions and values. Our organization, the OUZS, together with similar parent associations, has succeeded in removing many toxic bills from the race and expelling a number of foreign agents and other degenerates from the country. In particular, an amendment to the Federal Law "On Education" was recently adopted banning the use of smartphones (and any "educational" apps on them, of course) in the educational process. Therefore, I urge you all to be proactive—not to be afraid, but to act! And we will definitely succeed." ✅ https://youtu.be/ZBSXb-q0KEs

title: РИА КАТЮША
text: Вот более ожидаемого мероприятия в Киеве на Пасху и не предвиделось. Разумеется – это просто "проявление свободы", собрать педерастов в день Воскресенья Господня, дабы никто не усомнился, что осквернение Лавры и избиения с арестами батюшек – это были никак не случайные вещи.Все это логическое завершение истории, которую бесноватые "феминки" устроили еще в 2012 году, спилив Крест. У нас в то же время "Пуськи" вломились в Храм, но были так оттяганы обществом, что процесс резко затормозили.На самом деле, это и есть тот самый "бытовой" сатанизм, когда вот так заменяют Пасху педерастами и он был бы, а возможно и будет у нас, если хотя бы раз позволим сотворить подобное. Процесс у нас затормозили, но кресты уже пилят. А тут, как и на Украине, главное начать, и чтобы не били за это. "Свобода выбора" это такая, когда твои святыни не имеешь права защитить.
Google_Trans: A more anticipated event in Kyiv for Easter was unforeseen. Of course, it's simply a "manifestation of freedom"—gathering homosexuals on the day of the Lord's Resurrection—so that no one would doubt that the desecration of the Lavra and the beatings and arrests of priests were anything but random. This is the logical conclusion to the story that the possessed "feminists" started back in 2012, when they sawed down the cross. At the same time, our "Puski" group broke into the church, but they were so distracted by society that the process was abruptly halted. In fact, this is precisely the very same "everyday" Satanism, when they replace Easter with homosexuals, and it would have existed, and perhaps will continue to exist, if we allowed such a thing to happen even once. The process has been stalled here, but the crosses are already being sawed down. Here, as in Ukraine, the main thing is to start, and not be beaten for it. "Freedom of choice" is when you have no right to protect your sacred things.

text: 💬 Russian MFA Spokeswoman Maria Zakharova: Kiev and its Western patrons are pursuing their disinformation campaign against our country.In early April, they tried to accuse Russian military personnel of killing civilians in Bucha. Rusia menganggap penciptaan ruang bersama yang damai, stabil, dan sejahtera di Eurasia sebagai komponen integral dari proses ini.Jelas bahwa penyelesaian tugas-tugas berskala global seperti itu tidak mungkin terwujud tanpa menyatukan upaya, memperkuat rasa saling percaya, kesiapan untuk bekerja sama, dan mencari solusi bersama. Pada saat yang sama, syarat yang tak terpisahkan dan tak dapat dicabut adalah penghormatan terhadap hak berdaulat setiap negara atas model pembangunannya sendiri dan kepatuhan terhadap prinsip-prinsip Piagam PBB secara keseluruhan.
